# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

proxy_configs:
- name: "httpbin" # Unique identifier of the config (required) 
  routeIdSelector_: //envoyapi.RouteConfiguration/routeConfigurations[name=default]//matchingRoutes/{service}  
    matchClause { regexp : "/v1/(.*)" }     listeners: "0.0.0.0:80" # Match on any path under /  v2 (required)          name_: envoyapi.NetworkLoadBalancer/Upstreams[name=upstream_httpbin]
    clusters: ["backend"]                 type: sds       // Use SRDS to load balancers with consistent hashing, required if backend service refers a Service Discovery instance  (required)         hosts:[ "127.0.0.1", {sockaddr : "/var/run/consul/consul.sock"}]
    defaultRoute: true                   # Redirect to Upstream with cluster 'backend' if no route matched, required             upstreamIdSelector_: //envoyapi.UpstreamConfiguration[name=upstream_httpbin]  name : "default-to-service/localhost:" localhost portName -1
    statsConfig:   "# Ingress"           # StatsD instance to receive access and error counts from envoys, required (required)         prefix_: ingress.envoy                 hostPortForStatsd_ "-30254"  namespace_"ingress-controller/httpbin/"       interval "60s".
    requestIdleTimeout: -1            # Idle timeout for requests in seconds if no data is received from a client before it gets closed. Default value depends on the implementation (required)   corsConfiguration { policy : ALLOW_ALL }  transportSocket { socketAddress bindToPort_: "-30254" acceptIdleConnections: true connectionTimeout "1s"}
